title: Developing a novel computer visualization system to simulate the uranium upward transport mechanism: Uranium pollution in arid landscapes
author: Lou, Larson, et al.

steps.title: Procedures
steps.instruction: The procedures in this study included designing and creating multiple components, including visual elements (e.g., the Sun and rain), designated visualization areas called canvases (e.g., the sky, soil, and water canvases), and animations (e.g., the raining, wetting, drying, and transporting animations). These components were coordinated to visualize a complete U upward transport mechanism in arid landscapes.
